items.name: mosaic-button
items.title: MosaicButton
items.description: Accessible button atom built on @base-ui/react. Variants: default, secondary, ghost, destructive, outline, link. Sizes: default, sm, lg, icon, icon-sm, icon-lg.

items.name: mosaic-navbar
items.title: MosaicNavbar
items.description: Scroll-aware fixed navbar: hide-on-scroll-down, blur backdrop, mobile hamburger menu. Props: logo, links[], cta. No hardcoded branding.

items.name: mosaic-hero-split
items.title: MosaicHeroSplit
items.description: Two-column split hero: copy left, media right. Props: eyebrow, title, subtitle, cta, ctaSecondary, media. Falls back to centered single-column when no media.

items.name: mosaic-feature-centered-media
items.title: MosaicFeatureCenteredMedia
items.description: Centered feature section: heading + body + optional feature grid + centered media slot. Props: title, body, features[], media.

items.name: mosaic-stats-grid
items.title: MosaicStatsGrid
items.description: Border-grid statistics section. Props: stats[] {label, value}, heading, subtext. Values are plain strings; animate at consumer level.

items.name: mosaic-pricing-card
items.title: MosaicPricingCard
items.description: Single pricing tier card. Props: tier, price, features[], cta, highlighted. Compose multiple in a grid for a full pricing section.

items.name: mosaic-logos-grid
items.title: MosaicLogosGrid
items.description: Logo cloud / partner logos grid. Props: logos[] {name, src, width, height}, heading. Grayscale hover effect.

items.name: mosaic-testimonials-grid
items.title: MosaicTestimonialsGrid
items.description: Masonry-style testimonials grid: featured item spans half width, rest stack. Props: testimonials[] {id, quote, author, role, avatar?, logo?}, heading.

items.name: mosaic-footer-simple
items.title: MosaicFooterSimple
items.description: Simple multi-column footer. Props: columns[] {id, heading, links[]}, legal, logo?, social[] {label, href, iconSrc?}.
